creator: bsam@passap.ru
text:
14.10.2013 11:45, Koop Mast Ð¿Ð¸ÑÐµÑ:

> Do you need a updated cairo for something specific?

I try to create a port of graphics/inkscape-devel (which should build
at 10.x, since inkscape stable version does not build). And it requires
_pango_ >= 1.24. So I just created and update for cairo and pango for
the most recent versions. The requirement for cairo is >= 1.10, which
we already have.

-- 
WBR, Boris Samorodov (bsam)
